series_metadata.series_description: Contains all data related to new construction and maintenance and repair projects of all State and State/Federal funded contracts. Includes documents evidencing approvals from funding sources, invitations to bid, bid specifications, plans, bids received, slections and approval of low bidder, payments to contractors, correspondence and evidence of completion and acceptance.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: One calendar year close of calendar year in which project is completed and
